name: spec-oxide-mcp-for-spec-driven-development-with-claude-code-to-avoid-token-waste
description: Spec Oxide is a comprehensive workflow and toolset that enables spec-driven development for AI-assisted coding with Claude Code. You agree on what to build before any code is written. Spec Oxide ships a CLI and an MCP server to list and manage specifications as Markdown files as well as change proposals. A built-in search functionality finds the relevant spec files to avoid loading too many files into the Claude Code context window.
